emails.subject: Ameren - deal 1060746
emails.body: Ameren deal 1060746 The confirmation for deal 1060746 was faxed this morning to Emma. I called her and left her a message that if the confirmation was not received to please get back with me. I also wanted to let you know that October 22nd is my last day. I have accepted a position with Freight Markets. I am in the process of training Sean Riordan who will be taking my place.

emails.subject: RE: Ameren - deal 1060746
emails.body: RE: Ameren deal 1060746 Get out of here!!!! Is this an Enron company? If so, I am so happy for you Lizzie, I will certainly miss you. You and I have been working together for years and it's just been so comfortable! (just like "old shoes") I wish you well and I know you'll do a great job! To: Mims, Patrice L.

emails.subject: RE: Ameren - deal 1060746
emails.body: Yes this is an Enron company. You're right, just like old shoes and I hope everyone is well taken care of. To: Hernandez, Elizabeth L.

emails.subject: RE: Ameren - deal 1060746
emails.body: Hey Lizzie, what is her address, I forgot, I need to send her a business card To: Mims, Patrice L.

emails.subject: RE: Ameren - deal 1060746
emails.body: Her address is: Ameren Energy Fuels and Services Company, as agent for Union Electric Company 1901 Chouteau Ave MC 611 St. St. Louis, MO 63103 To: Hernandez, Elizabeth L.
